Xmas Highland Cow Stockings Merchant video Designed with adorable 3D features including soft ears, fluffy detailing, and signature Highland cow horns, this stocking adds a fun countryside charm that stands out beautifully and delights both children and adults during the holiday season. Generously sized at approximately 60cm high and 33cm wide, this extra-large Christmas stocking provides ample space for sweets, toys, chocolate, small gifts, and Christmas Eve surprises, making it both decorative and practical for festive gifting. Previous page Next page Complete with a strong and reliable hanging loop, this stocking is easy to display on fireplaces, staircases, bedroom doors, or Christmas trees, making it a charming and thoughtful festive gift for kids, animal lovers, and anyone who enjoys unique Christmas decorations. Previous page Next page 1 About This Item 2 Measurement 3 Cute & Useful 4 Luxury Plush Faux Fur 5 Festive Gift Idea What is the size of this Highland Cow Christmas stocking? The stocking measures approximately 60cm high and 33cm wide, providing plenty of space for sweets, small gifts, and festive treats. Can this stocking be hung securely on a fireplace or staircase? Yes, it comes with a strong, reinforced hanging loop that keeps it securely in place on fireplaces, stair banisters, doors, or even Christmas trees. What materials is the stocking made from? It is made from soft faux fur and felt with detailed 3D ears and horns, creating a premium, cosy, and durable festive decoration.
